FreeCAD_CLI_Toolkit.description: Agent Native FreeCAD CLI - Complete machine-readable tool schema for AI agents
execution_rules: All commands must be executed strictly in order, one operation per command
Use --json flag for all programmatic consumption
Use --project flag for multi-step workflows to enable session persistence
All dimensions are in millimeters (mm) unless otherwise specified
Element names must be unique within a document
Subsequent commands can only reference previously created element names
Do not merge multiple operations into a single command
For complex multi-step workflows, use --project for state persistence
Maximum 10 commands per batch; provide execution results between batches

add.ex: fc part add box --name B --param Length=20 --param Width=15 --param Height=10 --json

boolean.ex: fc part boolean cut --base B --tool C --name BH --json

revolution.ex: fc body revolution Body Sketch --angle 360 --axis Z --json

pattern-linear.ex: fc body pattern-linear Body Hole --direction X --count 3 --spacing 10 --json

pattern-polar.ex: fc body pattern-polar Body Hole --axis Z --count 6 --angle 360 --json

pattern-mirror.ex: fc body pattern-mirror Body Hole --plane XY --json

datum-plane.ex: fc body datum-plane Body --name DP --plane XY --offset 10 --json

datum-line.ex: fc body datum-line Body --name DL --direction Z --json

boolean.ex: fc mesh boolean fuse --base M1 --tool M2 --name F --json

sweep.ex: fc surface sweep --profile S --path P --name SW --json

export.ex: fc techdraw export P1 --output drawing.pdf --format pdf --json

alias.ex: fc spreadsheet alias --sheet Params --cell A1 --alias Length --json

link.ex: fc spreadsheet link --sheet Params --cell A1 --object Box --property Length --json

constraint.ex: fc assembly constraint --type coincident --obj1 Base --obj2 Pillar --json

material.ex: fc fem material --analysis SA --material Steel --object Part --json

constraint.ex: fc fem constraint --analysis SA --type fixed --object Part --json

postprocess.ex: fc cam postprocess --job J1 --output out.nc --post linuxcnc --json

gui_to_cli_mapping.Create a box: fc part add box --name Box --param Length=20 --param Width=15 --param Height=10 --json
gui_to_cli_mapping.Create a cylinder: fc part add cylinder --name Cyl --param Radius=5 --param Height=20 --json
gui_to_cli_mapping.Create a sphere: fc part add sphere --name Sph --param Radius=8 --json
gui_to_cli_mapping.Create a cone: fc part add cone --name Con --param Radius1=10 --param Radius2=3 --param Height=15 --json
gui_to_cli_mapping.Boolean union (fuse): fc part boolean fuse --base Box --tool Cyl --name Fused --json
gui_to_cli_mapping.Boolean cut (subtract): fc part boolean cut --base Box --tool Cyl --name Cut --json
gui_to_cli_mapping.Boolean intersection: fc part boolean common --base Box --tool Cyl --name Common --json
gui_to_cli_mapping.Mirror a part: fc part mirror Box --plane XY --name BoxMirrored --json
